backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the blog platform backend with types for BlogPost, UserProfile, and images, plus CRUD operations for posts, user profiles, comments, and access-controlled admin functions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old blog post schema (with flat image fields) into the new schema with structured featuredImage and inlineImages fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (blog post form upgrades, image rendering, and comment section) to their corresponding frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using Tailwind directives.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React app, setting metadata and mounting the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wrapping admin-only pages in AdminRoute and exposing create/edit post routes to any authenticated user.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: UI component displaying an access denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component for admin routes that currently renders children without any access guard logic.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Renders a sticky blog sidebar with a remedy search widget (with click-outside and keyboard handling) and a popular posts list with category counts.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays a comment submission form and a list of existing comments for a given blog post, using React Query hooks for fetching and posting.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Renders a large hero-style featured blog post card with an overlay image, metadata (author, date, read time), and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, and social media icons (Facebook, X, Instagram, YouTube).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes the Navigation and Footer around a flex-column main content area.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop/mobile menus, a categories dropdown, an admin link, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a compact blog post card with a featured image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A forwarded-ref input component with a search icon and clear button that handles keyboard events (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) and exposes them as optional callbacks.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: A dropdown component that displays a list of remedy search results with keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape) and navigates to the selected result's path on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available and an anonymous actor otherwise, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on blog posts (get published, get all visible, get by ID/slug, create, update) using the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: A hook that holds a static list of remedy pages with keywords and returns filtered results based on a search query matched against titles, categories, and keywords.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive OKLCH-based CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes including an AyurGlow-specific color system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with React Query, Internet Identity authentication, and the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings using icon-decorated cards in a styled layout.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts, supporting create, edit, delete, and publish/unpublish actions with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid alongside a sidebar, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post fetched by slug, rendering HTML content with resolved inline image URLs, metadata, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post, handling title, slug, category, content, featured image upload, and optional immediate publishing.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating fields from fetched post data and supporting image replacement and publish state changes.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Displays a hair care page focused on dandruff and scalp care, listing four Ayurvedic remedies (e.g., Neem-Tea Tree Oil, Lemon-Yogurt Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Renders a page with four Ayurvedic remedies for preventing and reversing premature grey hair, including treatments like Curry Leaves-Coconut Oil Infusion and Bhringraj-Brahmi Oil, each with ingredients, steps, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Presents a hair fall treatment page featuring four natural Ayurvedic remedies such as Onion Juice and Amla-Shikakai Hair Pack, each detailing ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: Displays a hair growth remedies page with four Ayurvedic treatments including Castor Oil-Coconut Oil Blend and Hibiscus-Curry Leaves Hair Pack, each listing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: Displays a hair care page featuring five Ayurvedic oil treatments and hair masks (e.g., Hot Oil Treatment, Brahmi-Amla Oil, Banana-Avocado Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Hair Care section.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Displays the Hair Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic hair care subcategory cards (e.g., Hair Fall Treatment, Hair Growth Boosters) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Renders a health remedies page with four natural remedies for managing diabetes and blood pressure (Fenugreek Water, Bitter Gourd Juice, Cinnamon-Honey Tonic, Garlic-Lemon). Displays ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout with a medical disclaimer.

A styled alternative to DiabetesBPPage that presents the same four diabetes and blood pressure remedies using Card components, a hero section, and an Alert-based medical disclaimer. Includes a back link to the Health Remedies section.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Displays four Ayurvedic digestion and gut health remedies (Triphala Churna, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, Ajwain Water, Buttermilk with Cumin) with preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions in a styled card layout with a hero section.

A simpler digestive health remedies page listing four remedies (Triphala Powder, Ginger-Lemon Tonic, CCF Tea, Ajwain Water) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency using a minimal card layout without a hero section.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Alternative immunity-boosting remedies page using shadcn Card components, featuring a hero section with a back-navigation link and four similar Ayurvedic remedies with structured preparation and benefits lists.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, Almond-Saffron Milk) with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
Alternative stress and sleep solutions page using shadcn Card components with a purple-themed hero section, back-navigation link, and four Ayurvedic remedies including preparation steps and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Displays four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul, Ginger-Green Tea, Cabbage-Carrot Juice) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic health subcategory cards (e.g., Immunity Boosting, Digestion, Weight Management) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the site's home page with a full-screen hero section, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with a hero header and multiple styled cards covering sections such as Introduction, Information We Collect, and data usage details.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: A detailed skin care page displaying four Ayurvedic acne and pimple remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, rendered as styled cards with a hero section and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: A page listing four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Cinnamon-Honey Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency displayed in a simple card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: A page presenting four Ayurvedic anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Papaya-Yogurt Enzyme Mask) with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and frequency in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: A page showcasing five DIY Ayurvedic face pack recipes (e.g., Multani Mitti Deep Cleanse, Besan-Turmeric Brightening) categorized by skin type, with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: A page featuring four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Glow Mask, Saffron-Milk Radiance Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: A skin care page displaying four natural remedies for pigmentation and dark spots, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, rendered as styled cards with a hero section and back navigation.

An alternative pigmentation remedies page listing four Ayurvedic brightening treatments with ingredients, application steps, and benefits, displayed in a simpler card layout without the hero section or back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin care subcategory cards (e.g., Natural Glow, Acne Treatment, Anti-Aging) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Renders the Terms of Service page for AyurGlow Secrets, including a medical disclaimer alert and multiple sections covering agreement to terms, website use, and other legal content displayed in styled cards.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for handling blog post images: converting ExternalBlob objects to direct URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values with resolved blob URLs using those index attributes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support for values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, a custom AyurGlow color palette using OKLCH CSS variables, custom font families (Playfair Display, Inter), border radius tokens, and extended box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for AyurGlow Secrets, documenting the site summary, architectural notes, required images with dimensions, existing implemented features, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0.
